description: City-pair lane rate averages (no state/province-only rows — those ranges are too wide). No transaction dates — counts reflect historical rows from the source spreadsheet, stored as benchmarkAvgUsd (USD equivalent; CA–CA lanes converted with LOB_CAD_TO_USD_RATE at build time).
sourceSpreadsheet: WholeSaler_Trucker_Lists.xlsx (user-provided; path on machine that last ran the script)
liveDataTransition: LaneRateObservation rows (from posted loads and imports) replace this base only when enough samples exist in the rolling window — see LOB_MIN_SAMPLES_FOR_DB_BENCHMARK and LOB_BENCHMARK_WINDOW_DAYS in .env.example.
